sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n58387" key="koinismo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κοιν-ισμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n58387.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">mixture of dialects</tr_>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.l. in</abbr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.3.59</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
